publisher.description: The publisher of the Log Analytics solution.

product.description: The product of the Log Analytics solution.

solution_name.description: The name of the Log Analytics solution.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the solution.

workspace_name.description: The name of the Log Analytics workspace.

workspace_resource_id.description: The resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
